creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
5.0 once built out of the box, but 5.1b (Final release) has several bugs
reported when building under FreeBSD.
	http://www.w3.org/Library/User/Patch/
libwww would also be useful for porting Thot and Amaya.
In a future, we should also nuke the linemode browser since it is
included in libwww's distribution.
